title: Blush Ballroom Ceiling Drape Setup
description: Sheer blush fabric ceiling drape with warm pin spot lighting. Great reference for the Emerald Hall October layout. #quinceañera #eventdecor #ballroomdecor
alt_text: Ballroom ceiling draped in sheer blush fabric with warm uplighting and crystal chandelier

title: Champagne and Blush Centerpiece — Tall Arrangement
description: Tall gold stand with white hydrangea and blush roses. Exactly the scale I want for the Rodriguez tables. #centerpiece #quinceañera #floraldesign
alt_text: Tall gold stand centerpiece with white hydrangea, blush roses, and eucalyptus greens on a round table

title: Burgundy and Gold Table Runner Setup
description: Satin burgundy table runner with gold chargers and deep red rose centerpieces. Fuentes Quinceañera color reference. #eventdecor #quinceañera #burgundygold
alt_text: Banquet table with satin burgundy runner, gold chargers, white napkins, and deep red rose centerpiece

title: Gold Uplighting in a Banquet Hall
description: Warm gold uplighting around a banquet hall perimeter. Transforms a plain room completely. Going to spec this for the Fuentes event. #uplighting #eventlighting #quinceañera
alt_text: Banquet hall with gold uplights along every wall, warm-toned room with guests dancing in the center

title: Quinceañera Number Cookie Set — Royal Icing
description: Custom decorated sugar cookies in tiara, crown, high heel, and 15 number shapes with detailed royal icing. Good reference for dessert table cookie orders. #decoratedcookies #quinceañeracookies #royalicing
alt_text: Eight decorated sugar cookies in quinceañera shapes — crown, tiara, heel, dress, and 15 number — in pink and gold royal icing

title: Three-Tier Dessert Table Layout
description: Tiered dessert table with mini cakes, macarons, cake pops, and decorated cookies. The height variation is what makes these look professional. #desserttable #quinceañeradesserts #eventdesserts
alt_text: Three-tier dessert display table with risers, macarons, mini cakes, and cake pops in blush and gold

title: Multicolor Uplighting — Color Change Demo
description: Side-by-side showing the same ballroom in four different uplight colors. Useful for walking clients through options before they commit to a color. #uplighting #eventlighting #ballroomdecor
alt_text: Four-panel image showing the same ballroom in purple, blue, gold, and pink uplighting

title: Pozole Rojo from Scratch
description: Dried guajillo and ancho chile pozole with pork neck bones. The broth is the whole point. Toast the chiles longer than you think is right. #pozolo #mexicancooking #weekendcooking
alt_text: Large pot of deep red pozole rojo with pork, hominy, and toppings including shredded cabbage and radish

title: Slow-Cooked Carnitas — Dutch Oven Method
description: Pork shoulder carnitas cooked low and slow in a Dutch oven, then crisped under the broiler. Four hours, twenty minutes to eat. Worth it every time. #carnitas #mexicancooking #porkcarnitas
alt_text: Crispy carnitas on a cutting board with lime wedges, white onion, and cilantro on the side

title: Tamale Setup for Christmas Eve
description: How to set up a tamale assembly line for a family batch. Masa consistency tips and a red pork filling recipe. #tamales #navidad #mexicanchristmas
alt_text: Tamale assembly station with masa spread on corn husks, pork filling, and a pot of steaming tamales

title: Dark Walnut Media Console — Living Room
description: Low-profile dark walnut media console with clean lines and cable management. Exactly what I put in my living room on Spring Valley. The warm tone works well against light walls. #homedecor #livingroom #mediaunit
alt_text: Dark walnut low-profile media console with a TV mounted above it and minimal decor on the surface

title: Blackout Cellular Shades for Apartment Bedrooms
description: Cellular blackout shades in a neutral linen color. Huge difference from builder blinds. Las Vegas sun requires this if you work nights. #windowtreatments #apartment #blackoutshades
alt_text: Bedroom window with soft linen-tone cellular blackout shades lowered against afternoon sun

title: Small Keepsake Box Build — Dovetail Joints
description: Walnut keepsake box with hand-cut dovetail corners and a cedar-lined interior. A project I want to do this winter when the hotel schedule slows down. #woodworking #keepsakebox #dovetail
alt_text: Small walnut wood keepsake box with hand-cut dovetail joints and open cedar-lined lid

title: Floating Shelf Build — Simple Router Dado Method
description: How to cut dadoes with a router for floating shelf brackets. No visible hardware. I want to add these in the hallway for the kids' photos when they visit. #woodworking #floatingshelves #diy
alt_text: Floating oak shelves on a white wall with no visible hardware, holding small framed photos

title: Low Cluster Centerpiece — Garden Style
description: Low garden-style centerpiece with mixed greenery, white blooms, and trailing ivy. Works well for outdoor receptions and intimate ballrooms. #centerpiece #gardenparty #floraldesign
alt_text: Low round centerpiece with mixed white flowers and trailing greenery on a linen-covered table

title: Mixed Height Centerpiece Arrangement — Alternating Tables
description: Alternating tall and low centerpieces on adjacent tables. Adds visual rhythm to a large room without over-spending on florals for every table. #centerpiece #eventflorals #quinceañera
alt_text: Long banquet room with alternating tall and low centerpieces on adjacent tables in white and gold

title: Morales Quinceañera — Completed Event Photos
description: Archived mood board and final event photos for the Morales Quinceañera at Desert Rose Banquet Hall, November 2023. Purple and silver theme.
alt_text: A window seat reading nook with cushions throw blanket and a stack of Louise Penny novels

title: Emerald Hall Floor Plan — 150 Guest Layout
description: Floor plan reference for round table layout at 150 guests with a center dance floor and DJ booth along the east wall. Pinned for vendor reference. #eventplanning #venuelayout #quinceañera
alt_text: Ballroom floor plan diagram showing 15 round tables, a center dance floor, and stage placement

title: Floral Sugar Cookie Tutorial — Piped Petal Technique
description: Step-by-step on piping rose petals with royal icing on a round sugar cookie. Good technique to reference when briefing the cookie baker for an event. #cookiedecorating #royalicing #sugarart
alt_text: Hands piping pink rose petal shapes onto a round white sugar cookie using a small piping bag

title: Tres Leches Cake — Classic Version
description: Classic tres leches with whipped cream topping and cinnamon dust. This is the birthday cake in our house. Has been since the kids were small. #tresleches #mexicandessert #homemade
alt_text: Square white cake soaked in three-milk mixture with whipped cream topping and a light dusting of cinnamon
